omitted_declarations.policy_reference: account security analysis Conduct user demographic analysis (e.g., region, mobile phone model, operating system platform, system language and Poppo version) for multiple projects to better understand how our users use Poppo The network and account traffic statistics of the content and service used by users to access third-party services through Poppo open platform are carried out, so as to report the basic analysis of how Poppo users use their services to the third-party service providers.
